name: dbgap_phs003428_missing_fields.json
why_it_exists: Every access pack / SL map / gap-lineage report is a durable operational asset — must be addressable.

missing_fields.description: Fahad Kiani's actual eRA Commons username string (account is CLEARED/active; only the username text needs to be inserted into the DAR form)
missing_fields.how_to_obtain: Log into https://public.era.nih.gov/commonsplus — username is displayed in the top-right corner of the dashboard. Insert into DAR form and CTEP email signature block.

missing_fields.description: Fahad Kiani's institutional email address for DAR form and CTEP email contact block
missing_fields.how_to_obtain: Use institutional email associated with CrisPRO / Brenus Pharma eRA Commons account. Insert into CTEP email before sending and into DAR PI contact field.

missing_fields.description: Fahad Kiani's institutional phone number for CTEP email contact block
missing_fields.how_to_obtain: Use institutional phone number. Insert into CTEP email signature block before sending.

missing_fields.description: Full institutional mailing address for CrisPRO / Brenus Pharma
missing_fields.how_to_obtain: Use the official registered address of CrisPRO / Brenus Pharma. Insert into CTEP email [INSTITUTION_NAME] placeholder and DAR form address field.

missing_fields.description: Specific name, type, and security specifications of the computing environment where phs003428.v1.p1 data will be stored and analyzed (server name, HPC cluster, cloud platform, or local secure workstation)
missing_fields.how_to_obtain: Coordinate with IT Director (S04) to document the specific computing infrastructure. Must confirm AES-256 encryption, access controls, audit logging, and NIH dbGaP security compliance. Provide server/system name in DAR computing environment field.

missing_fields.description: Full name of the Institutional Signing Official authorized to commit CrisPRO / Brenus Pharma to the Data Use Agreement
missing_fields.how_to_obtain: Fahad contacts CrisPRO / Brenus Pharma leadership (CEO, VP Research, or Chief Compliance Officer) to identify the designated SO. Check institutional eRA Commons registration for existing SO designation.

missing_fields.description: Institutional email address of the Signing Official
missing_fields.how_to_obtain: Obtain from SO directly once identified in S02. Must be institutional email matching eRA Commons account.

missing_fields.description: eRA Commons username of the Institutional Signing Official (required to countersign DAR in eRA Commons)
missing_fields.how_to_obtain: SO logs into https://public.era.nih.gov/commonsplus to confirm existing account or registers new account under institution. Registration takes 1-3 business days if new.

missing_fields.description: Full name of the IT Director or IT Security Officer who will attest to the data security plan
missing_fields.how_to_obtain: Fahad contacts CrisPRO / Brenus Pharma IT department or administration to identify the IT Director or designated IT Security Officer.

missing_fields.description: Institutional email address of the IT Director
missing_fields.how_to_obtain: Obtain from IT Director once identified in S04.

missing_fields.description: eRA Commons username of the IT Director (required in current dbGaP DAR form for IT security attestation)
missing_fields.how_to_obtain: IT Director registers at https://public.era.nih.gov/commonsplus if not already registered. Confirm current DAR form requirement at dbGaP portal.

missing_fields.description: Formal IRB determination: exemption under 45 CFR 46.104(d)(4) or full IRB approval
missing_fields.how_to_obtain: Submit IRB application immediately (parallel to S01). Request expedited exemption determination for secondary research use of de-identified/coded data with no patient contact. Provide IRB with: study description, phs003428.v1.p1 dataset description, confirmation of no patient contact, and data security plan.

missing_fields.description: IRB protocol number or exemption determination number issued by the institutional IRB
missing_fields.how_to_obtain: Obtained automatically upon IRB determination (S06). IRB issues written determination letter with protocol/exemption number.

missing_fields.description: Date of IRB approval or exemption determination

ready_to_send_today: S01 — CTEP email to NCICTEPDAR@mail.nih.gov (insert PI email, phone, and [DATE] before sending)
raw.note: eRA Commons PI account CLEARED. Send CTEP email today to start 14-day BMS clock. All 14 missing fields are institutional/personnel details that Fahad must collect in parallel — none require waiting for external approvals before collection begins. Critical path to data download: S01 (today) → S07 (14 days) || S06 (5-14 days) || S03/S05 (1-3 days) → S08 → S09 → S10 (28-56 days) → S11 (7-14 days) → S12.
